name: CoreWeave, Inc.
business: CoreWeave provides a cloud computing platform purpose-built for AI workloads, including model training, inference, and agent development. The company sells its services primarily through multi-year committed contracts to AI labs, enterprises, and technology companies. As of December 31, 2025, CoreWeave had $60.7 billion of remaining performance obligations.

exposures.sentence: CoreWeave Cloud platform enables the full lifecycle of AI, including large-scale model training, inference, data movement, continuous iteration, and agentic workflows.
We operate our platform across a distributed network of purpose-built data centers interconnected through a proprietary global network backbone.
For example, as a result of our obligations in our current customer contracts, all of the GPUs used in our infrastructure today are NVIDIA GPUs.
Our business would be harmed if we were not able to access sufficient power or by increased costs to procure power, prolonged power outages, shortages, or capacity constraints.
